rationale: The page provides detailed information on several scientific and technological topics including SODAR, HANSA-3 (NG) trainer aircraft, the KAVACH train protection system, Shinkansen technology, and aircraft Black Boxes. These are distinct, factual entries suitable for multiple-choice questions.
cleanedText:
It is designed & developed by CSIR–Advanced Materials and Processes Research Institute (AMPRI), Bhopal.
About SODAR
• Function: SODAR works by sending sound pulses and subsequently monitoring the intensity and frequency of the returned signal.
• Specifically, it determines the lower-atmosphere wind profile and temperature structure.
• Provides information on height of inversion, height of fog layer, strength of turbulence etc.
8.9.2. HANSA-3 (NG)
CSIR (Council of Scientific and Industrial Research)-National Aerospace Laboratories (NAL) signs technology transfer deal with a private firm to manufacture HANSA trainer-planes.
About HANSA- 3 (NG)
• Powered by an advanced fuel-efficient Rotax 912 iSc3 Sports engine.
• Significance: Offers Large and world-class flying training ecosystem; strengthen India’s aviation industry, etc.
8.9.3. KAVACH
Union Minister for Railways announced that Kavach 5.0 will be implemented to upgrade Mumbai’s suburban train travel.
About Kavach
• Indigenously Automatic Train Protection system designed to improve train safety and efficiency.
• Function: The Kavach assists loco pilots by displaying signals in the train and automatically applying the brakes if the pilot fails to do so.
• Ensures that the train operates smoothly even in extreme weather conditions, such as fog.
• Radio Frequency Identification (RFID) tags are placed throughout the entire track length to enable the Kavach to track train positions and detect any potential safety issues along the route.
8.9.4. SHINKANSEN TECHNOLOGY
Next generation E10 Shinkansen trains are to be introduced simultaneously in India (Mumbai-Ahmedabad Bullet train project) and Japan.
About Shinkansen Technology
• It is Japan’s High-speed bullet train.
• It is the world's safest and most reliable high-speed, high-volume and high-frequency transport system.
• Key Features:
o Dedicated track for high-speed rail that is free of level crossings and ATC system (Automatic Train Control System).
o Aerodynamic optimization of the leading shape, vehicle noise reduction, etc.
8.9.5. BLACK BOX
Aircraft Accident Investigation Bureau (AAIB) recovered the Black Box from the wreckage of Air India’s Boeing 787.
About Black Box
• Purpose: Records data during flights and crucial information on plane crashes.
• Comprise two Critical Flight Recording Devices: Flight Data Recorder and Cockpit Voice Recorder.
• Colour: Bright orange to ensure high visibility.
